name: Danny Detective Inc
overview: Subrata Sharma is a reporter who leaves his job and joins a small time detective agency, Danny Detective Inc. in Kolkata. Working on a kidnapping case, his boss, Danny, is killed. Circumstances force Subrata to take up the case. He travels to Dooars to unravel a big time criminal underworld and catches the killer. He takes up the responsibility of the agency.

trailers.title: Danny Detective Inc - Official Trailer | Bangla Web Series | A Series by Anjan Dutt | KLiKK Original
